untranslatable_reason: This signal requires external fundamental value estimates and information confidence scoring, which cannot be derived from price-action indicators alone. The core logic depends on: (1) a fundamental value calculation outside the engine, (2) an information source confidence score (≥0.65) that must be supplied externally, and (3) multi-source analysis validation. The 10% valuation discrepancy threshold has been approximated as price thresholds (0.90 for 10% discount, 1.10 for 10% premium), but without actual fundamental value estimates, this is a placeholder. The confidence score and multi-source requirement (required_analysis_sources: 2) cannot be implemented within price-action constraints.
translation_notes: Signal requires external fundamental value estimates and confidence scoring not available from OHLCV indicators. Entry/exit conditions use approximate price thresholds as placeholders. The actual implementation requires: (a) a fundamental value input feed, (b) external confidence scoring mechanism, and (c) multi-source validation logic outside the backtest engine. Position sizing (4% per trade) and exit decay (60 days) have been incorporated into parameters.
